title: Trapped by Fear
writer: Jean Bassan, Roger Ribadeau-Dumas, Jacques Dupont
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Alexandra Stewart, Sylva Koscina
plot: Two French paras who had lived through deadly situations in Algeria, meet again in civil life. Frapier is a newspaper reporter, and one day finds his friend Porte - surrounded by the police after a car theft, and an accidental kil...
